name: Peculiar Golf
about: Peculiar Golf is an all-weather driving range facility offering golf lessons, equipment sales and repairs, and a high-end TrackMan simulator experience. The venue provides a comprehensive golf practice environment with one-hour lessons for all ages and skill levels, featuring video swing analysis. The facility is equipped with a TrackMan Indoor Simulator suitable for individual practice, group outings, and leagues, making it a versatile space for year-round golf activities regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium TrackMan technology with detailed ball flight data
All-weather driving range and simulator for consistent practice year-round
Professional coaching with video swing analysis for all skill levels
Indoor golf leagues and events for competitive play
Equipment services including repairs and re-gripping

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary simulator with ball and club tracking data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility provides all necessary equipment, but golfers are welcome to bring their own clubs. The venue also offers used golf equipment for purchase.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify food and drink options, but this appears to be a practice-focused facility rather than a dining establishment.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The TrackMan simulator allows for flexible play times. For leagues, participants play 9 holes weekly. For casual play, the time depends on group size and pace, with capacity for up to 4 players per bay.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Peculiar Golf offers golf lessons for all ages and skill levels, making it suitable for juniors and families.
